title: crotalaria strigulosa
intro: Crotalaria strigulosa, also known as the hairy rattle pod, is a plant species in the pea family native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Crotalaria strigulosa is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, and it has been used in herbal preparations to create teas, infusions, and tonics. In some cultures, the plant's seeds are used to make a paste or decoction that is applied topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
